args.CodeContent:
"-- Migration: Create Affiliate system tables and configure initial settings

-- 0. Drop clicks table if it was created or exists
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS public.website_store_affiliate_clicks CASCADE;

-- 1. Alter website_pooja_products to add commission_percent override
ALTER TABLE public.website_pooja_products ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS commission_percent INTEGER;

-- 2. Create website_store_affiliates table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.website_store_affiliates (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  user_id UUID NOT NULL UNIQUE REFERENCES public.website_store_users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  code TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  enabled BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT timezone('utc'::text, now())
);

-- 3. Create website_store_affiliate_commissions table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.website_store_affiliate_commissions (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  affiliate_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES public.website_store_affiliates(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  referee_id UUID REFERENCES public.website_store_users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  order_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, -- matches website_store_orders(order_id)
  order_subtotal NUMERIC NOT NULL,
  commission_percent INTEGER NOT NULL,
  commission_amount NUMERIC NOT NULL,
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Pending' CHECK (status IN ('Pending', 'Approved', 'Rejected', 'Paid')),
  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT timezone('utc'::text, now())
);

-- 4. Create website_store_affiliate_withdrawals table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.website_store_affiliate_withdrawals (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  affiliate_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES public.website_store_affiliates(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  amount NUMERIC NOT NULL,
  upi_id TEXT,
  bank_details JSONB, -- account_number, ifsc_code, bank_name, holder_name
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Pending' CHECK (status IN ('Pending', 'Approved', 'Paid', 'Rejected')),
  created_at TIMEST
